name: book-to-persona
description: Converts any bestselling book PDF into a dual-purpose persona blueprint — coaches humans AND governs AI agents. 3-phase pipeline. Model selection is DYNAMIC per phase via shared-utils/select_model.py — picks the latest available Kimi (Ollama Cloud preferred), falls back to OpenRouter Kimi, then OAuth GPT, then DeepSeek V4+. Never Anthropic. Stops and asks the owner if nothing matches.
author: BlackCEO / Trevor Otts

models._comment: Dynamic selection — see PIPELINE.md and shared-utils/select_model.py. The strings below describe the SELECTION INTENT per phase, NOT hardcoded model IDs. The selector resolves them at install/run time against whatever the client has in openclaw.json.
